name: Loader FullGPTQ XSA11 + Online Ngram Agreement
blurb: Built on PR #1060 Loader_FullGPTQ_XSA11_BigramHash2816, retuned to use WARMDOWN_ITERS=4000, and adds a single-pass online causal token+within-word+word-start+agreement eval path that stays under the 10-minute eval budget. Consistent 3-seed reruns average 1.11084505 val_bpb with +0.00592984 nats/byte over the current 1.1194 leaderboard entry.
author: Anirudh Rahul
